_meta.description: Declarative recipe catalog for blank slide designs. Each recipe is a list of shapes with positions and repeat patterns.

architecture-stack.description: 4-5 horizontal layers stacked vertically with title left, description right

process-flow.description: 3-5 step boxes with arrow connectors between them

stat-callouts.description: 2-4 large numbers with labels and descriptions

comparison-columns.description: Two side-by-side columns with accent header bars

icon-text-grid.description: 2x2 or 2x3 grid of titled text cards

big-number-hero.description: Single large number centered with description below

hero-statement.description: Single bold statement centered on slide

three-pillars.description: Three pillars with accent header and description

pros-cons.description: Two columns: green positives vs orange challenges

pyramid-3.description: Three-level pyramid (wide at bottom, narrow at top)

before-after-numbers.description: Before vs After with large numbers and arrow between

numbered-checklist-6.description: Six numbered checklist items in two columns

metric-dashboard.description: 2x2 grid of metric cards with large numbers

kpi-row-4.description: Four KPIs in a horizontal row

funnel-4.description: Four-stage funnel with progressively narrower bars

donut-stats-3.description: Three circular stat indicators with numbers

data-highlight-2.description: Two large data points side by side

chevron-flow-4.description: Four chevron steps in a row

chevron-flow-5.description: Five chevron steps in a row

circular-process-4.description: Four steps arranged in a cycle with arrows

numbered-checklist-8.description: Eight numbered checklist items in two columns

feature-matrix-4x4.description: Four features vs four options header grid

vs-split.description: Full slide split with VS divider

hub-spoke-6.description: Central hub with six surrounding nodes

modular-blocks-6.description: Six modular capability blocks in 2x3 grid

feature-cards-4.description: Four feature cards with accent headers

benefit-grid-3.description: Three benefit cards with icons-style headers

key-message.description: Single key message centered with large font

two-point-contrast.description: Two contrasting statements side by side

highlight-box.description: Highlighted text box with accent border

four-quadrants-labeled.description: 2x2 quadrant with colored backgrounds and labels

bridge-diagram.description: Bridge from current state to future state

icon-highlight-3.description: Three highlighted blocks with accent top border

icon-highlight-4.description: Four highlighted blocks with accent top border

feature-cards-6.description: Six feature cards 2x3 with accent headers

feature-matrix-3x5.description: Three options vs five feature rows

metric-comparison-3.description: Three metrics side by side with variance

feature-matrix-header.description: Feature comparison with header row and column

two-col-text-text.description: Two equal text columns without headers

two-col-accent-split.description: Two columns: dark accent left, light right

two-col-stat-detail.description: Large stat number left, detail text right

swot-analysis.description: SWOT analysis 2x2 grid with colored headers

executive-dashboard.description: Executive dashboard: 3 KPIs top, detail area bottom

value-proposition-canvas.description: Value proposition: customer pains/gains vs product features/benefits

tco-comparison.description: Total cost of ownership comparison: two options side by side with cost breakdowns

roi-calculator.description: ROI calculator: investment left, returns right, ROI center
